notableEvents.label: J.T. Realmuto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: J.T. Realmuto grounds into a double play, shortstop Luisangel Acuña to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Miguel Vargas. Alec Bohm out at 2nd. J.T. Realmuto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth singles on a ground ball to pitcher Jonathan Bowlan. Chase Meidroth to 2nd. Chase Meidroth advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Jonathan Bowlan.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner steals (13) 3rd base. Bryce Harper steals (5) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Seranthony Domínguez. Trea Turner scores. Bryce Harper to 3rd. J.T. Realmuto to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Bryce Harper. Jacob Gonzalez to 2nd. Jacob Gonzalez advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by first baseman Bryce Harper.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott flies out to left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi flies out to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Chase Meidroth to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Gonzalez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Gonzalez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Adolis García.

notableEvents.label: Rikuu Nishida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rikuu Nishida lines into a double play, pitcher Brad Keller to shortstop Trea Turner. Jacob Gonzalez out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi grounds out, second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper.
